!important;\n}\n\n/* Result Page Styles */\n.result-container {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 100%;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\n}\n\n.result-image {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: auto;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n.result-overlay {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 0;\n    left: 0;\n    right: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: flex-start;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n    gap: 14px;\n    padding: 54px 52px;\n    background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.42) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16) 55%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 85%);\n}\n\n.result-overlay.right-align {\n    align-items: flex-end;\n    text-align: right;\n}\n\n.result-title {\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    font-size: 2.8rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    line-height: 1.15;\n    margin: 0;\n    text-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);\n}\n\n.result-description {\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    font-size: 1.25rem;\n    margin: 0 0 22px;\n    text-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);\n    line-height: 1.45;\n    max-width: 520px;\n}\n\n.restart-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 14px 40px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    margin-top: auto;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.22);\n}\n\n.restart-button:hover {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.3);\n}\n\n/* Responsive Design */\n@media (max-width: 600px) {\n    .options-grid {\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n    }\n\n    .landing-title {\n        font-size: 1.8rem;\n    }\n\n    .result-title {\n        font-size: 1.5rem;\n    }\n\n    .question-title {\n        font-size: 1.2rem;\n    }\n\n    .landing-overlay,\n    .result-overlay {\n        padding: 20px;\n    }\n\n    /* Let text bars grow naturally on small screens to avoid clipping */\n    .option-text {\n        height: auto;\n        min-height: 88px;\n    }\n}\n\n\n.card-link{\n    color: var(--ppl-electric-orange);\n    text-decoration: none;\n}"
```json
}
```

---

Switched the site typography to Raleway by loading it from Google Fonts and making it the global default.

- Added preconnects and the Raleway stylesheet link in `index.html` ([Raleway](https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Raleway)).
- Updated the global `font-family` in `styles.css` to use Raleway with existing fallbacks.
- Lints: no issues reported.
